info.title: Breezy HR API
info.description: Breezy HR recruitment platform REST API v3 for managing companies, positions, candidates, pipelines, questionnaires, users, and webhooks.

post.description: Authenticates and returns a session token

get.description: Returns detailed info about the authenticated user
Returns companies accessible to the user
Returns custom candidate attributes for a company
Returns custom position attributes for a company

put.description: Updates the state of a position

get.description: Returns the activity stream for a position
Returns team members for a position
Returns custom fields for a position

put.description: Updates a custom field for a position

post.description: Creates a candidate by parsing a resume

get.description: Returns conversation thread for a candidate

post.description: Adds a message to a candidate conversation
Uploads a document for a candidate
Moves a candidate to a different stage
Updates a questionnaire for a candidate
Uploads a resume for a candidate
Sends a questionnaire to a candidate

put.description: Updates the stage for a candidate

get.description: Returns activity stream for a candidate

post.description: Adds a note to candidate activity stream

get.description: Returns custom fields for a candidate

put.description: Updates a custom field for a candidate

get.description: Returns webhook endpoints for a company
